title: Avoid Nested Conditional Expressions
description: Nested conditional expressions can make code more complex and harder to understand.
recommendation: Refactor the code to use simpler conditional structures.

noncompliant.code: if x > 10: if y > 5: return True else: return False else: return False

compliant.code: if x > 10: return y > 5 else: return False

why_is_this_an_issue: Nested conditional expressions can make code more complex and harder to understand, making it more prone to errors and harder for other developers to maintain.
how_to_fix: Refactor the code to use simpler conditional structures.
